name: AT&T Inc.
description: AT&T Inc. is a leading American multinational telecommunications holding company headquartered in Dallas, Texas. As one of the world's largest telecommunications providers, the company offers a comprehensive range of services, including wireless communications, high-speed fiber internet, and advanced digital entertainment solutions. AT&T is dedicated to connecting people and businesses through its extensive network infrastructure, consistently investing in next-generation technologies like 5G and fiber optics to enhance connectivity, drive innovation, and deliver reliable communication services to millions of customers across the United States and around the globe.
